queries.question: Show me the features every banking app has.
queries.sql: SELECT Features.feature_value  from Mobile_Banking_App_Features join Mobile_Banking_App on Mobile_Banking_App_Features.mobile_banking_app_id = Mobile_Banking_App.app_id join Features on Mobile_Banking_App_Features.feature_id = Features.feature_id   GROUP BY Mobile_Banking_App_Features.feature_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Mobile_Banking_App_Features.mobile_banking_app_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Mobile_Banking_App)

queries.question: Show me the features every banking app has.
queries.sql: select mobile_banking_app.app_version , features.feature_value from Mobile_Banking_App_Features join Mobile_Banking_App on Mobile_Banking_App_Features.mobile_banking_app_id = Mobile_Banking_App.app_id join Features on Mobile_Banking_App_Features.feature_id = Features.feature_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?app_version ?feature_value WHERE {
  ?mobile_banking_app_features a :Mobile_Banking_App_Features .
  ?mobile_banking_app a :MobileBankingApps .
  ?mobile_banking_app_features p:hasMobile_Banking_App ?mobile_banking_app .
  ?features a :Features .
  ?mobile_banking_app_features p:hasFeatures ?features .
  ?mobile_banking_app p:app_version ?app_version .
  ?features p:feature_value ?feature_value .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the features every banking app has.
